subject: Build file watcher + event processor + WebSocket server
description: Implement src/server/watcher.ts (Bun native file watching, 100ms debounce, try/catch JSON.parse), src/server/processor.ts (message classification, broadcast detection with 500ms hold window, idle suppression, reaction correlation, dependency unblock cascades), src/server/server.ts (WebSocket at localhost:3456, REST GET /state), src/server/journal.ts (JSONL session journal).
activeForm: Building file watcher, processor, journal, and server
